name: PER_CHECKLIST_ACTIONS
description: PER_CHECKLIST_ACTIONS : Stores the event for a checklist

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key

columns.Name: EVALUATION_MODE
columns.Comments: Evaluation Mode.

columns.Name: CONDITION_TEXT1
columns.Comments: Stores the checklist action trigger condition

columns.Name: CONDITION_TEXT2
columns.Comments: Stores the checklist action trigger condition

columns.Name: CONDITION_TEXT3
columns.Comments: Stores the checklist action trigger condition

columns.Name: CONDITION_TEXT4
columns.Comments: Stores the checklist action trigger condition

columns.Name: CONDITION_TEXT5
columns.Comments: Stores the checklist action trigger condition

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_CHECKLISTS_B.CHECKLIST_ID

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique for each checklist

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments:
The type of event. Valid values are

ORA_ACTION_AND_REASON - Action / Action reason

ORA_PERSON_DATA_CHANGE - Person data change

columns.Name: EVENT_CODE
columns.Comments:
Mandatory for ACTION_TYPE= ORA_PERSON_DATA_CHANGE

The event code

columns.Name: OLD_VALUE
columns.Comments:
Mandatory for ACTION_TYPE= ORA_PERSON_DATA_CHANGE

The old value of the column.

Valid values are

ORA_NO_VALUE - No Value

ORA_ANY_VALUE - Any Value

ORA_SPECIFIC_VALUE - Specific Value

columns.Name: OLD_VALUE_SPECIFIC
columns.Comments: Mandatory for ACTION_TYPE= ORA_PERSON_DATA_CHANGE and OLD_VALUE = ORA_SPECIFIC_VALUE

columns.Name: NEW_VALUE
columns.Comments:
Mandatory for ACTION_TYPE= ORA_PERSON_DATA_CHANGE

The new value of the column.

Valid values are

ORA_NO_VALUE - No Value

ORA_ANY_VALUE - Any Value

ORA_SPECIFIC_VALUE - Specific Value

columns.Name: NEW_VALUE_SPECIFIC
columns.Comments: Mandatory for ACTION_TYPE= ORA_PERSON_DATA_CHANGE and NEW_VALUE = ORA_SPECIFIC_VALUE

columns.Name: ACTION_ID
columns.Comments:
Mandatory for ACTION_TYPE= ORA_ACTION_AND_REASON

Foreign Key to PER_ACTIONS_B.ACTION_ID

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON_ID
columns.Comments:
Valid only for ACTION_TYPE= ORA_ACTION_AND_REASON

Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_REASONS_B.ACTION_REASON_ID

columns.Name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the action is active or not.

columns.Name: OBSOLETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the action is obsolete or not.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: RULE_ID
columns.Comments: RULE_ID

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
